# Pull Request Template

## Summary

What does this pull request change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation clarification or correction
- [ ] New or revised architectural content
- [ ] Scope or boundary change
- [ ] Roadmap, release, or evaluation update
- [ ] Repository metadata or workflow update
- [ ] Other

## Documentation affected

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/
- [ ] article/
- [ ] prototype/
- [ ] examples/
- [ ] None

## Architecture affected

- [ ] No architectural content changed
- [ ] Clarification only
- [ ] Architectural proposal updated
- [ ] Boundaries or assumptions updated
- [ ] Roadmap updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Links resolve correctly
- [ ] Markdown formatting is consistent
- [ ] No architectural claims were rewritten without intent
- [ ] Any added metadata follows repository conventions
- [ ] Validation has been run locally where applicable

<!-- End of template -->
